ast_parse_backend.command: python3 -c 'import ast; ast.parse(...)' on 9 backend files
ast_parse_backend.summary: All 9 M012 backend files parse cleanly: migration, model, schemas, router, __init__, state.py, _flow_message_flow.py, _flow_response_flow.py, flow_helpers.py

migration_structure.command: grep patient_flow_overrides + down_revision in migration file
migration_structure.summary: Migration file exists with patient_flow_overrides table and correct down_revision = m011_s01_patient_flow_states_index

get_merge_source.command: grep source: Literal in schema + _build_merged_days in router
get_merge_source.summary: GET endpoint returns merged days with source: Literal['global', 'override'] indicator via _build_merged_days

put_cache_invalidation.summary: PUT endpoint saves overrides and invalidates Redis cache via delete_pattern(f"flow_override:{flow_state.id}:*")

get_day_config_override.command: grep patient_flow_state_id (count>=3) + flow_override: cache key in state.py
get_day_config_override.summary: _get_day_config accepts patient_flow_state_id (8 occurrences) and checks flow_override: cache before global template

skip_logic.command: grep skip in state.py + skipped in flow_helpers.py
skip_logic.summary: Skip logic present in state.py override block and flow_helpers.py with 'skipped' status handling

override_immutability.summary: Overrides stored in separate patient_flow_overrides table (D021), merged at read-time via _build_merged_days — global template never mutated

frontend_editor.summary: PatientDetailPage imports PatientFlowOverrideEditor and renders 'Personalizar Fluxo' button

future_day_restriction.command: grep current_flow_day in router + editable in schema + disabled={!day.editable} in editor
future_day_restriction.summary: Future-day restriction enforced: router computes current_flow_day, schema has editable field, editor disables past-day inputs

tsc_no_emit.summary: TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors

vite_build.summary: Vite production build succeeds — 4744 modules transformed, all chunks emitted
